title: 2025.12.04Building production-ready Stripe subscriptions using Kiro powersSummary:Learn how to build production-ready Stripe subscriptions faster using Kiro Powers. Implement secure payment flows, webhooks, and scalable architecture with AI assistance.Authors:Kalyani KoppisettiDan KiunaTopics:AWSPartnersRead
author: Kalyani Koppisetti
full_text:
Kalyani Koppisetti

Kalyani brings 25+ years of financial services technology experience to her role as Principal Partner Solutions Architect at AWS. She drives strategic initiatives helping partners architect cloud solutions that balance innovation with security and compliance requirements. Her thought leadership focuses on practical implementation of emerging technologies like GenAI in enterprise environments. Her extensive background in regulated industries uniquely positions her to guide organizations through responsible AI adoption. She actively contributes to the technology community through technical blogs, keynotes, and conference presentations.

Dan Kiuna

Dan is a Solutions Architect focused on Kiro at AWS. He focuses on supporting Agentic IDE development and bridging the gap between end users and the developers.
